zh.lifeSummary: 當John Halyburton of Dirleton於1289年出生在蘇格蘭時，他的父親Adam Haliburton32歲，母親Isabella Gifford36歲。他於大約1313年與Lady Agatha de Vaux在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1355年登記服兵役。他去世於1355年8月在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Halyburton of Dirleton于1289年出生在苏格兰时，他的父亲Adam Haliburton32岁，母亲Isabella Gifford36岁。他于大约1313年与Lady Agatha de Vaux在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1355年登记服兵役。他去世于1355年8月在苏格兰貝維其可爾享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John Halyburton of Dirleton was born in 1289, in Scotland, his father, Adam Haliburton, was 32 and his mother, Isabella Gifford, was 36. He married Lady Agatha de Vaux about 1313, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1355. He died in August 1355, in Berwickshire, Scotland, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Halyburton of Dirleton est né en 1289, à Écosse, son père, Adam Haliburton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Isabella Gifford, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Lady Agatha de Vaux environ 1313, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1355. Il est décédé en août 1355, à Berwickshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.Dirleton, East Lothian, Scotland: Dirleton, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Halyburton of Dirleton 1289 in Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam Haliburton 32 und seine Mutter Isabella Gifford 36. Er hat um 1313 in England Lady Agatha de Vaux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1355 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb im August 1355 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Berwickshire, Scotland.

Lui sposato Lady Agatha de Vaux circa 1313, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1355. Morì nel agosto 1355, nel Berwickshire, Scotland, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Halyburton of Dirletonが1289年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父Adam Haliburtonは32歳，母Isabella Giffordは36歳であった。約1313年にイギリスでLady Agatha de Vauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1355年に兵役登録をした。彼は1355年8月にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Halyburton of Dirleton(이)가 1289년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam Haliburton(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Gifford(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1313년 영국에서 Lady Agatha de Vaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1355년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1355년 8월 스컷랜드 버윅실르에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Halyburton of Dirleton nasceu em 1289, em Scotland, seu pai, Adam Haliburton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Gifford, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Agatha de Vaux aproximadamente 1313, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1355. Ele faleceu em agosto de 1355, em Berwickshire, Scotland, com 66 anos.

ro.Dirleton, East Lothian, Scotland: Dirleton, East Lothian, Scoția, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Halyburton of Dirleton родился в 1289 г. в местности Шотландия, его отцу по имени Adam Haliburton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella Gifford, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Agatha de Vaux около 1313 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1355 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер август 1355 г. в местности бирвиккшир, Шотландия в возрасте 66 лет.

Se casó con Lady Agatha de Vaux aproximadamente 1313, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1355. Murió en agosto de 1355, en Berwickshire, Scotland, a la edad de 66 años.
